'''sholangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eyelidless|eyelidless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eyelidless|eyelidless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sholangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholangithi|sholangithi]] || [[word:sholangiji|sholangiji]] || [[word:sholangishi|sholangishi]] || [[word:sholangiki|sholangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholanguthuthu|sholanguthuthu]] || [[word:sholangujuju|sholangujuju]] || [[word:sholangushushu|sholangushushu]] || [[word:sholangukuku|sholangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholanguthu|sholanguthu]] || [[word:sholanguju|sholanguju]] || [[word:sholangushu|sholangushu]] || [[word:sholanguku|sholanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholangufthuf|sholangufthuf]] || [[word:sholangufjuf|sholangufjuf]] || [[word:sholangufshuf|sholangufshuf]] || [[word:sholangufkuf|sholangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholangethe|sholangethe]] || [[word:sholangeje|sholangeje]] || [[word:sholangeshe|sholangeshe]] || [[word:sholangeke|sholangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholangothotho|sholangothotho]] || [[word:sholangojojo|sholangojojo]] || [[word:sholangoshosho|sholangoshosho]] || [[word:sholangokoko|sholangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholangotho|sholangotho]] || [[word:sholangojo|sholangojo]] || [[word:sholangosho|sholangosho]] || [[word:sholangoko|sholangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholangofthof|sholangofthof]] || [[word:sholangofjof|sholangofjof]] || [[word:sholangofshof|sholangofshof]] || [[word:sholangofkof|sholangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfthĂŻf|sholangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfjĂŻf|sholangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfshĂŻf|sholangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfkĂŻf|sholangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|sholangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|sholangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|sholangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|sholangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfthĂŻf|sholangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfjĂŻf|sholangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfshĂŻf|sholangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfkĂŻf|sholangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfthĂŻf|sholangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfjĂŻf|sholangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfshĂŻf|sholangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sholangĂŻfkĂŻf|sholangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholangĂŠthĂŠ|sholangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sholangĂŠjĂŠ|sholangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sholangĂŠshĂŠ|sholangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sholangĂŠkĂŠ|sholangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholangathatha|sholangathatha]] || [[word:sholangajaja|sholangajaja]] || [[word:sholangashasha|sholangashasha]] || [[word:sholangakaka|sholangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholangatha|sholangatha]] || [[word:sholangaja|sholangaja]] || [[word:sholangasha|sholangasha]] || [[word:sholangaka|sholangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholangafthaf|sholangafthaf]] || [[word:sholangafjaf|sholangafjaf]] || [[word:sholangafshaf|sholangafshaf]] || [[word:sholangafkaf|sholangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sholangasha|sholangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sholangshĂ«sha|sholangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sholangrosha|sholangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sholangmusha|sholangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sholangyasha|sholangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosholangnkshĂ«sha|gosholangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosholangnkrosha|gosholangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosholangnkmusha|gosholangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosholangnkyasha|gosholangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sholalangasha|sholalangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sholalangshĂ«sha|sholalangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sholalangrosha|sholalangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sholalangmusha|sholalangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sholalangyasha|sholalangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosholalangnkshĂ«sha|gosholalangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosholalangnkrosha|gosholalangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosholalangnkmusha|gosholalangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosholalangnkyasha|gosholalangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shelĂŠngasha|shelĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shelĂŠngshĂ«sha|shelĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shelĂŠngrosha|shelĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shelĂŠngmusha|shelĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shelĂŠngyasha|shelĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshelĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|goshelĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshelĂŠngnkrosha|goshelĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshelĂŠngnkmusha|goshelĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshelĂŠngnkyasha|goshelĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sholfangasha|sholfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sholfangshĂ«sha|sholfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sholfangrosha|sholfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sholfangmusha|sholfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sholfangyasha|sholfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosholfangnkshĂ«sha|gosholfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosholfangnkrosha|gosholfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosholfangnkmusha|gosholfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosholfangnkyasha|gosholfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
